GetType.Description: Returns the matieral type of the block

GetName.Description: Returns the pretty name of the block

IsType.Description: Checks if the material types of the two blocks are the same

SetBlock.Description: Sets the block to a new block

GetLocation.Description: Returns the location of the block

HasMetaData.Description: Returns whether the block has the MetaData

SetMetaData.Description: Set the MetaData of a block. Supports String, Number and Boolean

GetMetaData.Description: Get the MetaData by the key from a block
